justification: POS for PROMO-2026-Q1-008 shows 8,492 units of MF-BV-101 scanned in the promo window versus 13,692 claimed — the claim worksheet appears to include shipped, not just scanned, units. Scan allowances pay on scanned volume: 8,492 x $0.65 = $5,519.80. Settle partial at $5,519.80 and provide the weekly scan reconciliation to Harvest & Co.
